name: Vidalia Onion Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a casserole dish.
2. In the bottom of the dish, layer 1 onion slice, half a cup of crushed chips, half a cup of grated cheese, and pieces of butter.
3. Sprinkle paprika over the layers.
4. Repeat the layers.
5. Mix milk into the soup.
6. Pour the soup mixture over the onion layers.
7. Season with additional paprika and cayenne.
8. Bake at 325 to 350°F for 30 to 40 minutes.
